<script>
(function() {
  var btn = document.getElementById('theme-toggle');
  var saved = localStorage.getItem('theme') || 'light';
  if (btn) btn.textContent = saved === 'dark' ? '☀️' : '🌙';
  if (btn) btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    var current = document.documentElement.getAttribute('data-theme') || 'light';
    var next = current === 'dark' ? 'light' : 'dark';
    document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', next);
    localStorage.setItem('theme', next);
    btn.textContent = next === 'dark' ? '☀️' : '🌙';
  });
})();
</script>

  <div class="author__content">
    <h3 class="author__name">Reymond Akpanya</h3>
    
    <p class="author__bio">Postdoctoral Research Associate in Mathematics at the University of Sydney. Working with Prof. John Voight. Research in combinatorial topology, simplicial surfaces, and topological interlocking assemblies.</p>
